steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The sentence describes the music as having elements from both "the classical European tradition" and "the social, political, and cultural landscape of his native Cuba." We need a verb meaning to show, contain, or display these combined influences.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content:
Lecuona's music can be said to ______ elements of both the classical European tradition and Cuban culture — the blank must mean display or contain those influences. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — ‘defy’: resist or oppose — the music doesn't oppose these traditions, it draws from them. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘neglect’: fail to attend to — the opposite; the music actively incorporates these influences. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘foretell’: predict or foreshadow — musical elements are present, not predicted. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘exhibit’: show or display — the music displays elements from both traditions, which is exactly what the passage describes. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
